title: Multi-Language
metaTitle: Multi-Language ERP · Arabic, Hindi & More · Paper & Pen
metaDescription: Work in English, Arabic, Hindi, Bengali or Urdu, with full right-to-left Arabic. Each user picks their own language, on bilingual documents. Works worldwide.
keywords: multi language erp, arabic invoicing, rtl software, bilingual invoice, hindi software, urdu software, bengali, language software
heroTitle: One workspace, every language your team speaks
heroSubtitle: Paper & Pen speaks English, Arabic, Hindi, Bengali and Urdu, with full right-to-left Arabic. Every person works in their own language while everyone shares the same data.

features.title: Five languages
features.desc: English, Arabic, Hindi, Bengali and Urdu across the whole product.

features.title: Right-to-left Arabic
features.desc: Genuine RTL layout for the interface and Arabic invoice PDFs.

features.title: Per-user language
features.desc: Each teammate picks their own language without changing anyone else's.

features.title: Bilingual documents
features.desc: Send invoices and quotes with Arabic and English side by side.

features.title: Switch anytime
features.desc: Change language in one click, no reinstall, no separate version.

features.title: Same data, any language
features.desc: Language is just the display, your records stay consistent for everyone.

sections.title: Everyone works in the language they know
sections.body: On a typical GCC shop floor your accountant may prefer Arabic, your warehouse team Hindi or Urdu, and your manager English. Paper & Pen lets each person set their own interface language while sharing the exact same clients, stock and ledger.
items: Consistent data for the whole team

sections.title: Invoices and quotes in your client's language
sections.body: Send a client a clean Arabic invoice, an English quote, or both side by side on one page. Full right-to-left support means Arabic documents look right, not like translated afterthoughts. It's a genuine strength for the GCC, and just as useful anywhere your customers are multilingual.

faqs.a: English, Arabic, Hindi, Bengali and Urdu, across the entire product, including documents.
Yes. The interface and Arabic invoice PDFs use genuine right-to-left layout, not a patched-on translation.

faqs.q: Can different users use different languages?
faqs.a: Yes. Each user sets their own interface language while everyone works on the same shared data.
Yes. Issue documents in Arabic, in English, or with both side by side on a single page.
Yes. Multi-language is built into the free-forever core, not a paid extra.

ctaTitle: Run your business in your language
ctaSub: Start free and let every person on your team work in English, Arabic, Hindi, Bengali or Urdu.
